title: dryopteris sophoroides
intro: Dryopteris sophoroides, also known as Chinese scolopendria fern or Chinese wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris sophoroides include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
